data.title: On the Beach Group PLC Executes Share Buyback to Optimize Capital Structure
data.description:
On The Beach ( (GB:OTB) ) has shared an announcement.

On the Beach Group PLC announced a share buyback program, purchasing 300,000 of its own shares for cancellation, resulting in a reduction of its issued share capital to 157,878,228 shares. This move is part of the company’s strategy to manage its capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value, reflecting a proactive approach to financial management within the travel sector.

More about On The Beach

On the Beach Group PLC operates in the travel industry, specializing in providing beach holiday packages. The company focuses on offering affordable travel options primarily through online platforms, catering to customers seeking vacation deals.

YTD Price Performance: -9.30%

Average Trading Volume: 888,908

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: £361.4M

data.title: Alternative Income REIT Plc Announces Share Sale by Glenstone Property
data.description:
Alternative Income REIT Plc ( (GB:AIRE) ) just unveiled an update.

Alternative Income REIT Plc has announced the sale of shares by Glenstone Property plc, a person closely associated with Adam C Smith. The transactions involved the sale of 160,000 ordinary shares at varying prices, conducted on the London Stock Exchange between March 7 and March 11, 2025. This notification highlights the ongoing management of shareholdings within the company, which may impact investor perceptions and the company’s stock market performance.

More about Alternative Income REIT Plc

Alternative Income REIT Plc operates in the real estate investment trust industry, focusing on generating income through a diversified portfolio of properties. The company primarily invests in UK-based assets, aiming to provide shareholders with regular income and capital growth.

data.title: Keppel Infrastructure Trust Issues Units for Base Fee Payment
data.description:
Keppel Infrastructure ( (SG:A7RU) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Keppel Infrastructure Fund Management Pte. Ltd., the trustee-manager of Keppel Infrastructure Trust, announced the issuance of 1,646,787 units at S$0.4472 per unit as part of the base fee payment for the period from 1 July 2024 to 31 December 2024. This issuance represents 6.0% of the base fee, with the remaining 94.0% paid in cash, and reflects the trust’s ongoing commitment to its structured fee payment strategy as outlined in its trust deed.

More about Keppel Infrastructure

Keppel Infrastructure Trust (KIT) operates as a business trust in Singapore, focusing on infrastructure investments. It is managed by Keppel Infrastructure Fund Management Pte. Ltd., which oversees its portfolio of essential infrastructure assets.

YTD Price Performance: 0.62%

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $1.96B

data.title: Kam Hing International Schedules Board Meeting for Financial Review
data.description:
Kam Hing International Holdings Limited ( (HK:2307) ) has shared an announcement.

Kam Hing International Holdings Limited has announced a board meeting scheduled for March 27, 2025, to discuss and approve the company’s final results for the year ending December 31, 2024. The meeting will also consider the recommendation of a final dividend and address any other business matters, indicating a routine review of financial performance and potential shareholder returns.

More about Kam Hing International Holdings Limited

Kam Hing International Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, primarily engaged in the textile industry. It focuses on the production and distribution of textile products, catering to various market segments.

data.title: Atos and Venator Collaborate on Carbon Footprint Platform Implementation
data.description:
Atos SE ( (FR:ATO) ) has provided an announcement.

Atos Belgium, through its Eviden business group, has successfully implemented the Product Carbon Footprint (PCF) Platform at Venator, a global chemical manufacturer. This platform automates the calculation of carbon footprints for Venator’s products, integrating seamlessly with their IT systems and providing transparent and comparable data. This collaboration exemplifies the use of digital technology in reducing greenhouse gas emissions in the chemical industry, supporting sustainability goals and empowering customers to make informed decisions.

More about Atos SE

Atos is a global leader in digital transformation, specializing in cybersecurity, cloud, and high-performance computing, with approximately 82,000 employees and annual revenue of around €10 billion. The company provides tailored end-to-end solutions across various industries in 69 countries and is a pioneer in decarbonization services and products. Atos is committed to creating a secure and decarbonized digital environment for its clients.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: €703.9M

For a thorough assessment of ATO stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Coca-Cola HBC Executive Sells Shares in Compliance with Market Regulations
data.description:
Coca Cola HBC ( (GB:CCH) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Coca-Cola HBC AG announced that Mourad Ajarti, the Chief Digital & Technology Officer, sold 34,740 ordinary shares of the company, resulting in a net amount of approximately GBP 1,189,104. This transaction is part of a prior vested performance share award plan and was conducted in compliance with UK and EU Market Abuse Regulations, highlighting the company’s adherence to regulatory standards.

More about Coca Cola HBC

Coca-Cola HBC AG is a leading bottler in the beverage industry, primarily focusing on the production and distribution of Coca-Cola products across various markets.

data.title: Adriatic Metals Plc Sees Change in Shareholder Structure with UBS Acquisition
data.description:
Adriatic Metals Plc ( (GB:ADT1) ) just unveiled an update.

Adriatic Metals Plc has announced a significant change in its shareholder structure due to an acquisition or disposal of financial instruments by UBS Group AG. The transaction has resulted in UBS holding a total of 8.315246% of voting rights in the company. This adjustment in holdings could impact the company’s governance and strategic decisions, highlighting UBS’s increased influence as a stakeholder.

More about Adriatic Metals Plc

Adriatic Metals Plc is a UK-based company operating in the mining industry. The company focuses on the exploration and development of mineral resources, primarily in the Adriatic region.

data.title: Lai Si Enterprise Holding Limited Forecasts Significant Profit Turnaround for 2024
data.description:
Lai Si Enterprise Holding Ltd. ( (HK:2266) ) has provided an update.

Lai Si Enterprise Holding Limited has announced a positive profit alert, expecting to record a profit after tax between MOP 21.0 million and MOP 26.0 million for the year ended December 31, 2024, compared to a loss of MOP 18.7 million in 2023. This improvement is attributed to increased revenue and gross profit from projects in Macau’s shopping malls and luxury retail sectors. However, the financial results are preliminary and unaudited, with the final results to be published on March 27, 2025.

More about Lai Si Enterprise Holding Ltd.

Lai Si Enterprise Holding Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating in the construction and engineering industry. The company focuses on projects related to large shopping malls and luxury brand retail chains, particularly in Macau.

YTD Price Performance: 12.50%

Average Trading Volume: 129,200

data.title: UBS Reduces Stake in Revolution Beauty Group PLC
data.description:
Revolution Beauty Group plc ( (GB:REVB) ) has shared an update.

Revolution Beauty Group PLC, a company involved in the beauty industry, has experienced a significant change in its shareholder structure. UBS Group AG’s trading book holdings in Revolution Beauty Group PLC have fallen below the 5% threshold, resulting in a reduction of their voting rights to 0%. This change exempts them from further reporting obligations, potentially impacting the company’s market dynamics and stakeholder interests.
